Final view showing completed suture placement through drain

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw demonstrated

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain appears properly closed with good suture tension

technique_summary: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating proper FLS Task 5 techniques rather than an actual performance attempt. The video shows good needle handling and suturing fundamentals.
improvement_suggestions: This is a training demonstration - focus on practicing the demonstrated techniques
Apply consistent tension during knot tying
strengths: Good demonstration of proper needle loading
Clear visualization of suture placement technique
